questions.question: What is the main concern in the context of model multiplicity, and how does it differ from model selection?
questions.hint: Consider the implications of model multiplicity on model estimation and prediction

questions.question: A time series dataset exhibits two different models - an ARMA model and an ARCH model. Which of the following is a potential consequence of model multiplicity in this scenario?
questions.hint: Think about the trade-offs between model simplicity and model accuracy

questions.question: Explain the concept of model multiplicity in the context of time series analysis, and provide an example of how it can arise in practice.
questions.hint: Consider the role of model complexity and the implications for model estimation and prediction
